rulings.Case Title: HON C CHIANG et al VS. JAMES P GREEN et al
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER OVERRULED. CIVIL CODE 1354(B) NOT APPLICABLE BASED ON COMPLAINT ALLEGATIONS WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO ALLEGE AS AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES. NO CLAIM FOR MONETARY DAMAGES NECESSARY. (302/AJR/KS(EX))

rulings.Case Title: SHANGHAI AUTOMATION INSTRUMENT COMPANY, LTD., A CH et al VS. AUSTIN SUI et al
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION CONVERSION SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION BREACH OF CONTRACT SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE. ALLEGATIONS OF ALTER EGO NOT SUFFICIENTLY SPECIFIC. 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE. SAME GROUND AS 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION. 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION FRAUD SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE. ALLEGATIONS OF REPRESENTATIONS INSUFFICIENT. ALSO ALTER EGO ALLEGATIONS INSUFFICIENT. CLAIMS NOT BARRED BY STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION BREACH OF FIDUCIARY DUTY SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE. MORE FACTS RE JOINT VENTURE MUST BE ALLEGED. 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION UNJUST ENRICHMENT SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE. NOT UNJUST ENRICHMENT. 7TH CAUSE OF ACTION INTERFERENCE WITH CONTRACT SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE. NOT ADEQUATELY ALLEGED. 8TH CAUSE OF ACTION DECLARATORY RELIEF SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE. NO BASIS FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF. 9TH CAUSE OF ACTION CONSTRUCTIVE TRUST OVERRULED. ALLEGATIONS OF LOAN SUFFICIENT. MOTION TO STRIKE MOOT OFF CALENDAR. (302/AJR/CW(EX))

MAIN STREET MEDIA, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. KEEN.COM, INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER OVERRULED. NO SHOWING THAT MERGER AGREEMENT CONFLICTS DIRECTLY WITH THE ALLEGED MISREPRESENTATION. ASSUMING COURT TAKES JUDICIAL NOTICE OF MERGER AGREEMENT NEVERTHELESS. (302/AJR/AA)

rulings.Case Title: AGUILAR & SEBASTINELLI VS. 1700 CALIFORNIA STREET, LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND - ALLEGATION OF FRAUD INSUFFICIENT. INADEQUATE DESCRIPTION OF WHAT WAS SPECIFICALLY SAID TO WHOM. MOTION TO STRIKE ATTORNEY FEES UNDER 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION GRANTED. (302/AJR/PB)
